toefl-rdg.title: TOEFL Reading Section
toefl-rdg.studySummary:
# TOEFL iBT · Reading (January 2026 format)

Source: ETS Official Full-Length Practice Test.

In an actual test, you will answer up to 50 questions to demonstrate how well you understand academic and non-academic texts in English. There are three types of tasks.

## Task types

- **Complete the Words**: Fill in the missing letters in a paragraph.
- **Read in Daily Life**: Answer questions about everyday reading material.
- **Read an Academic Passage**: Answer questions about academic passages.

## Strategy
- Module 1 then Module 2 — you cannot return to Module 1 after starting Module 2.
- Mix of **Complete the Words**, **Read in Daily Life** (notices, emails, posts), and **Academic Passages**.
- Manage time across modules; academic passages support inference and vocabulary questions.


## TOEFL Reading Section Focus Topic 01

Comprehensive review and mastery of concepts related to TOEFL Reading Section, focusing specifically on subdomain category 01.

## Learning objectives
- Learn concept details of TOEFL Reading Section Focus Topic 01

## Common mistakes
- Common error in TOEFL Reading Section Focus Topic 01

- Listening Section In the listening section, you will answer up to 47 questions to demonstrate how well you understand spoken English. There are three types of tasks. Type of Task Description Listen and Choose a Response Select the best response to the question…

toefl-lis.title: TOEFL Listening Section
toefl-lis.studySummary:
# TOEFL iBT · Listening (January 2026 format)

Source: ETS Official Full-Length Practice Test.



## Task types

- **Listen and Choose a Response**: Select the best response to the question or statement.
- **Listen to a Conversation**: Answer questions about short conversations.
- **Listen to announcements and academic talks**: Answer questions about announcements and academic talks.

## Strategy
- **Listen and Choose a Response** — pick the most natural reply.
- **Conversations** and **announcements/talks** — take notes; you cannot go back.
- On test day you hear audio once; practice with one listen first, then review transcript.


## TOEFL Listening Section Focus Topic 01

Comprehensive review and mastery of concepts related to TOEFL Listening Section, focusing specifically on subdomain category 01.

## Learning objectives
- Learn concept details of TOEFL Listening Section Focus Topic 01

## Common mistakes

toefl-spk.title: TOEFL Speaking Section
toefl-spk.studySummary:
# TOEFL iBT · Speaking (January 2026 format)

Source: ETS Official Full-Length Practice Test.



## Task types

- **Listen and Repeat**: Listen and repeat what you heard.
- **Take an Interview**: Answer questions from the interviewer.

## Strategy
- **Listen and Repeat** — hear each line once, repeat clearly (zoo trainer script in official test).
- **Take an Interview** — answer spontaneously; no prep time on the real test.
- Use the study room microphone to record and replay your pronunciation.


## TOEFL Speaking Section Focus Topic 01

Comprehensive review and mastery of concepts related to TOEFL Speaking Section, focusing specifically on subdomain category 01.

## Learning objectives
- Learn concept details of TOEFL Speaking Section Focus Topic 01

## Common mistakes

toefl-wrt.title: TOEFL Writing Section
toefl-wrt.studySummary:
# TOEFL iBT · Writing (January 2026 format)

Source: ETS Official Full-Length Practice Test.



## Task types

- **Build a Sentence**: Create a grammatical sentence.
- **Write an Email**: Write an email using information provided.
- **Write for an Academic Discussion**: Participate in an online discussion.

## Strategy
- **Build a Sentence** — drag words into grammatical order.
- **Write an Email** — 7 minutes; complete sentences, clear purpose.
- **Academic Discussion** — 10 minutes; at least 100 words, respond to professor + peers.


## TOEFL Writing Section Focus Topic 01

Comprehensive review and mastery of concepts related to TOEFL Writing Section, focusing specifically on subdomain category 01.

## Learning objectives
- Learn concept details of TOEFL Writing Section Focus Topic 01

## Common mistakes
- Common error in TOEFL Writing Section Focus Topic 01

ielts-lis.title: IELTS Academic Listening
ielts-lis.studySummary:
# Overview
Comprehensive review and curriculum alignment for the IELTS Sections topic: **IELTS Academic Listening** within the IELTS Academic Listening domain.

# Concepts
1. **Core Mechanism**: Systematic application of IELTS Academic Listening properties.
2. **Contextual Analysis**: Evaluating problem parameters and mapping them to standardized representations.

# Definitions
- **IELTS Academic Listening**: A fundamental standard assessed on the IELTS exam.

# Formulas
- **General Equation**: Standard representations mapping to IELTS Academic Listening principles.

# Rules
1. Always isolate independent variables or identify main sentence boundaries first.

# Shortcuts
- **Substitution Method**: Fast testing of integer boundary constraints.

# Common Mistakes
- Confusing basic terms and coordinate options.
- Incorrect signs or distribution steps.

# Instructor Insights
Instructors suggest training students to look at the question's target units or grammatical categories prior to answering.

# SAT Question Types
- Multiple Choice (A-D)

# ACT Question Types
- Multiple Choice (4-option format)

# Difficulty Levels
- **Easy**: Direct one-step check.
- **Medium**: Multi-step conversion.
- **Hard**: Complex logical inferences.

# Practice Strategy
1. Start with conceptual drills without timing constraints.
2. Progress to full-length section practice matching timing standards.

# References
- Official test specifications manuals.

## IELTS Academic Listening Focus Topic 01

Comprehensive review and mastery of concepts related to IELTS Academic Listening, focusing specifically on subdomain category 01.

## Learning objectives
- Learn concept details of IELTS Academic Listening Focus Topic 01

## Common mistakes
- Common error in IELTS Academic Listening Focus Topic 01
